basic_details.job_title: SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 47 Technician, Junior Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS), Lucknow
basic_details.post_name: Various Group B & C Posts (Technical Officer, Junior Engineer, Perfusionist, Technicians, etc.)
basic_details.short_information: SGPGIMS Lucknow is recruiting 47 backlog posts with various qualifications. Last date for online application is 09 June 2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates must have attained 18 years and should not be more than 40 years as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per UP Government rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01-01-2026. Below are the **full essential qualifications and experience** for each post:

selection_process: Selection will be based on Computer Based Test (CBT) followed by Skill Test / Technical Examination (wherever applicable) and Document Verification. Final selection is based on CBT marks (qualifying nature of skill test).
Computer Based Test (CBT) Pattern (to be notified in detail later):
Objective Type Questions Medium: English only Minimum Qualifying Marks: 50% for OBC
Skill Test: Qualifying in nature for specific posts.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply **online only** through the official website http://www.sgpgims.org.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates can apply for multiple posts but must submit separate applications and pay separate fees for each post.
Before filling the Online Application, candidates must keep ready the following documents:
Recent Scanned Colored Photograph (JPG/JPEG, max 80KB)
Scanned Signature (JPG/JPEG, max 80KB)
Valid Email ID and Mobile Number (must remain active till recruitment process ends)
Scanned copies of Mark sheets & Certificates for 10th, 12th, Diploma, Graduation, Post-Graduation etc. in PDF format
Scanned copy of Caste/Category Certificate, Sub-Category, Domicile Certificate (if applicable) & Experience Certificate (if applicable) in PDF format
Visit the official website: https://www.sgpgims.org.in
Go through Advertisement, How to Apply, FAQ, and Helpdesk sections.
Click on “Registration for New Users” and register with Name, Post Applied, Date of Birth, Email ID, and Mobile Number.
After successful registration, you will receive User ID on Email and Password on Mobile.
Login using “Sign in for Existing Users”.
Fill the Application Form carefully in following sections: Personal Details Communication Details Qualification Details Document Upload & Payment
Personal Details
Communication Details
Qualification Details
Document Upload & Payment
Upload all required scanned documents in correct format and size.
Preview the application, edit if needed, and submit.
Pay the application fee through online mode (Debit Card / Credit Card / Net Banking).
After successful payment, take a printout of the application form and note down the Application Sequence Number for future reference.
Apply Online at: https://sgpgims.eapplynow.com/SGPGIBL26/Pages/Index.aspx
important_instructions: This is a direct recruitment process. No interview for most posts. Application fee is non-refundable. Reservation as per UP Government rules. All disputes subject to Lucknow Court jurisdiction.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in SGPGIMS Lucknow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Sanjay Gandhi Postgraduate Institute of Medical Sciences (SGPGIMS), Lucknow has announced a total of 47 backlog vacancies for various Group B and Group C posts. These vacancies are available for candidates belonging to SC, ST, and OBC categories under a special recruitment drive. The recruitment includes technical, paramedical, and support staff positions.

faq.question: Q2. Which posts are available under SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes posts such as Technical Officer, Junior Engineer, Perfusionist, Technician (Radiology), Medical Lab Technologist, Technician (Dialysis), Receptionist, Pharmacist Grade-II, Junior Occupational Therapist, and several other technical and healthcare-related positions. Candidates should check the official notification for complete post-wise vacancy details and eligibility conditions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for SGPGIMS Lucknow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply for SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026 only through online mode. The online application form will be available on the official website of SGPGIMS under the Recruitment or Career section. Applications submitted through offline or any other mode will not be accepted by the institute.

faq.question: Q4. What educational qualifications are required for SGPGIMS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications differ according to the post applied for. Generally, candidates should possess relevant Diploma or Degree qualifications in the concerned field from a recognized institution. Some posts may also require registration certificates or work experience. Applicants are advised to carefully read the detailed advertisement before submitting the online application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit and relaxation for reserved categories such as SC, ST, OBC, and PwD candidates will be applicable according to the rules of the Government of Uttar Pradesh. Detailed age-related eligibility information will be available in the official detailed notification released by SGPGIMS Lucknow.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for SGPGIMS Lucknow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process may include Written Examination, Skill Test, Interview, or other recruitment methods decided by the institute. Final selection of candidates will be completed after successful document verification. SGPGIMS authorities reserve the right to finalize the recruitment procedure depending on the post requirements

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for SGPGIMS Lucknow Group B & C Posts 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need to visit the official SGPGIMS website, complete registration using a valid email ID and mobile number, and fill the online application form carefully. Applicants must upload scanned copies of required documents, photograph, and signature before submitting the application form online. A printout of the submitted application should be kept for future reference.
